I am writing to file a complaint against Capital One Bank regarding their failure to resolve a dispute and the subsequent illegal sale of my information to a third-party debt collector.

Following the unresolved dispute, Capital One Bank sold my personal and financial information to a third-party debt collector without my consent. This action violates my rights under the Fair Debt Collection Practices Act ( FDCPA ) and other relevant consumer protection laws. The third-party debt collector has since contacted me, causing undue stress and harassment. 
I request the CFPB to investigate this matter and take appropriate action against Capital One Bank for their failure to resolve the dispute and the illegal sale of my information. I also seek assistance in ensuring that my information is no longer shared without my consent and that the third-party debt collector ceases all contact
